x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: High customization density on core tables creates risk of Now Assist conflicts during enablement. This composite score aggregates business rule, client script, and UI action counts to estimate deployment risk.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review the customization risk score and address high-risk items before Now Assist enablement. Focus on Business Rules that fire on insert/update of task, incident, and change_request. Document all customizations for the Now Assist configuration team.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c3a
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[High customization density on core tables creates risk of Now Assist conflicts during enablement. This composite score aggregates business rule, client script, and UI action counts to estimate deployment risk.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Instance Customization Risk Score</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaBR = new GlideAggregate('sys_script');
    gaBR.addQuery('collection', 'IN', 'incident,task,change_request');
    gaBR.addQuery('active', true);
    gaBR.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    gaBR.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaBR.query();
    var brCount = gaBR.next() ? parseInt(gaBR.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaCS = new GlideAggregate('sys_script_client');
    gaCS.addQuery('table', 'IN', 'incident,task,change_request');
    gaCS.addQuery('active', true);
    gaCS.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    gaCS.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaCS.query();
    var csCount = gaCS.next() ? parseInt(gaCS.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var risk = brCount + csCount;
    var actualValue = 'Risk score: ' + risk + ' (' + brCount + ' BRs + ' + csCount + ' client scripts on core AI tables)';

    if (risk <= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Customization risk score is ' + risk + ' — within acceptable range for Now Assist and AI Agent enablement.'
        };
    } else if (risk <= 100) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Customization risk score is ' + risk + ' (target: ≤50). High customization density on core AI tables creates conflict risk with Now Assist and AI Agent operations — review before enablement.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Customization risk score is ' + risk + '. Very high customization density on incident, task, and change_request creates significant risk of Now Assist and AI Agent conflicts — remediate before enablement.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>PLATFORM</module><number>CHK0000498</number><order>190</order><remediation_guidance>Review the customization risk score and address high-risk items before Now Assist enablement. Focus on Business Rules that fire on insert/update of task, incident, and change_request. Document all customizations for the Now Assist configuration team.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>0ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c3a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Instance Customization Risk Score</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_0ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c3a</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
